rows.label: xs06110150_MSG0001
rows.name: Was that thing trying to help us?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs06110150_MSG0002
rows.name:
Maybe so. I guess we could say
we've had a lucky escape for now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs06110150_MSG0003
rows.name: Yeah, I'd like to hope so...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs06110150_MSG0004
rows.name:
I'm concerned about the recovered Doll too. Let's
go back to NLA and check the storage hangar.[ST:wait ]
